overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character poling a wooden boat through a historic Middle Eastern canal city at night. The character navigates through narrow waterways between stone buildings, passes under a wooden bridge with water wheels, and emerges into a wider canal section with moored boats.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic canal with stone embankments and palm trees

events.description: passing a small boat with an NPC on the right side of the canal

agents.ego_description: poling a wooden boat steadily through the canal using a long pole

notable_agents.action: sitting in a small boat moored along the canal wall

entered.detail: tall stone buildings with small windows lining the left canal bank
historic stone structures with wooden balconies on the right bank
tall palm trees visible above the buildings on the right
long wooden boat being poled by the character
dark reflective water of the canal
small wooden boat with a seated figure

segments.scene_description: The character begins poling a wooden boat through a narrow canal flanked by historic stone buildings. Palm trees rise above the right bank, and the water reflects the dim night lighting. A small boat with an NPC is passed on the right side as the journey begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal approaching a covered wooden bridge with water wheels

events.description: large wooden water wheels become visible on the left bank

agents.ego_description: continuing to pole the boat forward as the canal narrows and approaches the bridge

entered.detail: large wooden bridge with fabric awnings spanning the canal ahead
large wooden water wheels attached to the left bank building

segments.scene_description: The boat continues through the narrowing canal as a large wooden bridge structure comes into view ahead. Historic stone buildings line both banks more closely, and prominent water wheels become visible on the left. The previously passed small boat and palm trees recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden bridge over canal with water wheels

events.description: entering the dark covered bridge structure overhead
exiting the covered bridge back into open canal

agents.ego_description: poling the boat through the dark enclosed space under the bridge

entered.detail: dark wooden beams and fabric canopy of the bridge directly overhead

segments.scene_description: The boat passes under a large wooden bridge structure, plunging the scene into darkness as the canopy blocks the sky. Wooden beams and fabric awnings create a tunnel-like effect overhead. The stone buildings are temporarily occluded by the bridge walls until the boat emerges back into the open canal at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: wider canal with moored boats and waterfront stalls

events.description: passing by multiple moored boats along the right bank

agents.ego_description: navigating the wider canal section with more open water and moored vessels

notable_agents.action: standing near a light source on the right bank

entered.detail: several wooden boats tied along the right canal bank
decorative banners and lights strung across the canal ahead
palm trees visible again along the right bank after the bridge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the bridge, the canal opens into a wider waterway with multiple moored boats lining the right bank. Stone buildings return to view on the left, and decorative string lights hang across the canal ahead. An NPC stands near a light source on the distant right bank as the journey continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a narrow historic canal that transitions from a secluded waterway into a wider, illuminated harbor. It begins with a hooded character poling a wooden boat past stone buildings and palm trees, gliding past a small vessel on the right. As the canal narrows, the camera moves toward a massive wooden bridge structure where prominent water wheels churn on the left bank. The scene then plunges into temporary darkness as the boat passes under the bridge's heavy beams and fabric awnings, creating a tunnel-like effect that occludes the surrounding architecture. Finally, the boat emerges from the shadows into an expansive waterway lined with moored boats and decorative string lights, moving toward a distant figure standing on the right bank.
